subtitle.en: Our custom plastic and hardware parts power products across many sectors.
subtitle.zh: 我们的定制塑胶与五金零件广泛应用于多个行业。

alt.zh: 电子设备塑胶外壳应用

desc.en: Plastic housings and structural parts for electronics, smart products, communication equipment, adapters, controllers and sensors.
desc.zh: 可为电子设备、智能产品、通信设备、电源适配器、控制器及传感器等产品提供塑胶外壳和结构件。

alt.zh: 工业控制塑胶零部件应用

desc.en: Durable molded parts for automation equipment, control systems, instruments, electrical devices, switches and panels.
desc.zh: 适用于自动化设备、控制系统、仪器仪表、电气设备、开关、面板及工业零部件。

desc.en: Plastic shells and internal parts for smart switches, smart sockets, thermostats and connected home devices.
desc.zh: 可制造智能开关、智能插座、温控器及智能家居设备的塑胶外壳和内部结构件。

alt.zh: 小型家电塑胶配件应用

desc.en: Reliable molded housings, panels, buttons and internal supports for small appliance products.
desc.zh: 为小型家电产品提供可靠外壳、面板、按键和内部支撑件。

alt.zh: 汽车电子塑胶配件应用

desc.en: Custom plastic parts for automotive electronics, sensors, connectors, wire protection, brackets, clips and small functional parts.
desc.zh: 支持汽车电子、传感器、连接器、线束保护件、支架、卡扣及小型功能件的塑胶定制生产。

alt.en: Medical and health device plastic housing application
alt.zh: 医疗健康设备塑胶外壳应用

desc.en: Plastic housings and components for medical, beauty, testing, therapy and home health products.
desc.zh: 为医疗健康设备、美容仪器、检测仪器、理疗设备及家用健康产品提供塑胶外壳和结构件。
